description: CompositionRed crew neck t-shirt in 100% organic cotton with chest print FittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry normal at low heat Warm iron when needed Dry cleanable The bright red tee in soft organic cotton infuses you with an energy to explore the outdoors.
